ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "acres" REAL /* Size of the property in acres */,
  "sq_ft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., active, sold, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., short sale, regular sale) */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the sale */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate agent involved in the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "seller_email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "agent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the feature belongs to */,
  "garage_type" TEXT /* Type of garage (e.g., attached, detached) */,
  "garage_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of cars the garage can hold */,
  "basement_access_type" TEXT /* Type of access to the basement (e.g., walkout, interior) */,
  "basement" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a basement */,
  "pool" INTEGER /* Whether the property has a pool */,
  "view" TEXT /* Type of view (e.g., mountain, city) */,
  "parking_type" TEXT /* Type of parking (e.g., street, garage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being assessed */,
  "assessment_value" REAL /* Value of the property assessment */,
  "tax_gross_amount" REAL /* Total tax amount for the property */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_assessments_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "easements" (
  "easement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each easement */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the easement belongs to */,
  "easement_type" TEXT /* Type of easement (e.g., conservation, utility) */,
  "easement_description" TEXT /* Description of the easement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("easement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_easements_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being surveyed */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the survey */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., boundary, topographic) */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covenants" (
  "covenant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each covenant */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the covenant belongs to */,
  "covenant_type" TEXT /* Type of covenant (e.g., architectural, environmental) */,
  "covenant_description" TEXT /* Description of the covenant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covenant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covenants_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, real estate agent) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view properties, edit properties) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
